SOCIety AND CuLtURE
pisoEL
pound subdivided into 100 pence. though some Francophone regions of the Federated Suns use the term centime instead Coins exist in 1, 2, and 10 pence denominations (aluminum) and 20 and 50 pence (silver alloy). Each coin bears the First Prince' head on one side and either the Davion insignia that of the March capital where was minted on the other Notes exist tor 100 500 and 000 pound denominations The  material used for these notes varies mint. Those printed on New Syrtis and New Avalon use hard- wearing but flexible plastic while those minted on Robinson are made paper. Each denomination is distinguished Dy color and size , with larger notes greater value. One side of each shows the Davion insignia and the image of the First Prince, while the other shows famous historical figures.
Free Rasalhague Republic The currency of the FRR is the krona (different from the Lyran kroneri, which divided into 100 aurar; Use 0f the krona (symbol: KA or R-bill} declined markedly in the years following the Clan invasion, wnen was largely replaced by the ComStar C-bill. The recent resurgence ofnationalist  sentiment the Republic however, has prompted wider uSC of the krona Coins come 5,10 and 40 aurar denominations, all copper alloy Notes exist in 1, 5, 25 and 100 krona denominations
Capellan Confederation Traditionally reflecting the weakest economy in the Inner Sphere_ the Capellan yuan symbol: or L bill) has strengthened in recent years Coins dominate the convoluted Capellan mone tary system. Each yuan iS divided into 10 jiao and each jiao into 10 fen. Coins exist in 1, and fen denominations (copper alloy); 2 and jiao (silver alloy); and 10 and 50 yuan denominations gold alloy). AII Capellan coins have hole bored through the center, allowing them carried money strings Notes also exist in 10, 50, 100 ad J0OO yuan denom inations but they are considerably less common than coins.
Free Worlds League For all its internal divisions the Free Worlds League has always had strong economy: Its currency: known as the eagle symbol: or M-bill) , reflects this_ The collapse of the Federated Commonwealth and the Draconis Combine economic difficul- ties have made the eagle the second strongest currency in the Inner Sphere Divided into 100 cents_ the eagle is perhaps the most diverse Inner Sphere currency, with each member-state of the Free Worlds League allowed to print its own variant: Though other   denominations exist, the most  common coins the League include 10 ad 25 cent pieces (usually copper alloy) and 50 cent and eagle pieces (silver alloy) The most common notes are 10 and 20 eagle bills_ though denom inations up t0 million eagles exist some areas
Draconis Combine Tne Draconis Combine' economy has been hard nit by the Clan invasion and the strain reintegrating former Smoke Jaguar worlds Consequently: the value oftne Combine (symbol: D or K-billl has dropped considerably. though its ong term prospects remain good, Each ryu is divided into 100 yen: The Combine government constantly changing the make-up of
